_meta.schema: CSI-grouped Estimate skeleton; each CSI division is a container with a list of CostLine entries grouped by trade. After the takeoff lands and sub-quotes arrive, fill `quantity`, `unit_cost`, and `notes` per row. Roll up subtotals per division, then apply the markup stack (contingency / overhead / profit / bond+insurance) per `proposal/10-price-proposal.md` § B.
_meta.schema_reference: core/schemas.py — Estimate / CostLine. This file complements takeoff-template.json — takeoff-template.json is a flat list of CostLines pre-shaped for the core estimator; this skeleton is grouped by CSI division for the per-trade roll-up that drives the Attachment A pricing summary.
_meta.owner: Angelo State University / Texas Tech University System
fill_instructions: 1. Wait for drawings + spec book + finish/door/equipment schedule from ASU FP&C (target 2026-05-25 per timeline.md).
2. Run takeoff per CSI division against takeoff-template.json line items (fill quantity + unit).
3. Solicit sub quotes (target 2026-05-29 EOD per timeline.md and outreach/05-email-hub-subs-template.md).
4. Transfer sub-quote totals into the per-division blocks below.
6. Apply markup stack per proposal/10-price-proposal.md § B.
7. Transfer base proposal price + $25K allowance to Attachment A § 2a and § 2b separately.
8. Transfer unit prices to Attachment A § 2d per the formulas in proposal/10-price-proposal.md § D.
owner_furnished_excluded_from_pricing: Fire suppression — Division 21 entries below carry quantity=0 and unit_cost=0
AV/IT systems and data cabling termination — Division 27 cable + termination entries carry quantity=0; only pathway (conduit/J-box) is priced
CBORD readers/controllers/electric strikes themselves — Division 28 device entries carry quantity=0; door prep + low-voltage pathway is priced separately under Division 08 and Division 26
FF&E / lockers / costume storage / makeup chairs — Division 10 lockers entry carries quantity=0
Equipment install (post-construction) — not a Division entry; coordination only via Division 01

markup_stack.note: Apply contingency to direct cost subtotal; apply OH and profit to (direct + contingency); apply bond/insurance to (direct + contingency + OH + profit). Allowance is SEPARATE — not in base, not marked up.

_meta.schema_explanation: Each division entry below contains: csi_division (2-digit string), title, total (sum-of-cost-lines for the division; populated post-takeoff), cost_lines (array of CostLine objects matching core/schemas.py CostLine shape). After fill, divisions sum to direct_cost_subtotal which feeds the markup stack.

divisions.title: General Requirements
divisions.notes: Self-performed; values per takeoff-template.json div 01 line items + post-quote sub-coordination labor.

cost_lines.description: General conditions / project supervision (PM + super + project engineer; 124-day window)
cost_lines.notes: Formula: months × monthly burden. ~4 MO from 7/1 to 11/2. Bump for active performing-arts coordination overhead per 07-risk-register.md R-08.

cost_lines.description: Temporary facilities and controls — dumpster, dust containment w/ negative-air HEPA, walk-off mats, portable toilet, project signage
cost_lines.notes: Formula: LS allowance. Bump for active building (sound mitigation; daily containment inspection). $10K-$15K range.

cost_lines.description: Project coordination — owner-vendor coordination POC time (CBORD, AV/IT, EHS, FP, FF&E)
cost_lines.notes: Formula: PM hours × loaded rate. Carry ~120 hr for the unusually-broad owner-furnished demarcation per 04-scope-of-work.md § A.

cost_lines.description: Submittal preparation + submittal log management
cost_lines.notes: Included in Div 01 GCs OR carry separately for visibility. ~15 major submittals per 06-quality-control-plan.md § 3.

cost_lines.description: Construction CPM schedule — baseline + monthly updates
cost_lines.notes: Per UGSC Art. 8.

cost_lines.description: Material testing / independent inspection
cost_lines.notes: OWNER-PAID per TTUS typical (confirm against RFCSP body). If GC-paid: $2,500-$5,000 allowance. See outreach/06-email-asu-procurement-clarifications.md question 16.

cost_lines.description: Project closeout — record drawings, O&M manuals, attic stock, owner training coordination, final clean
cost_lines.notes: $3,500-$6,500 range typical. Per UGSC Art. 11 + 06-quality-control-plan.md § 8.

divisions.title: Existing Conditions / Selective Demolition
divisions.notes: Subcontracted to a HUB-certified demo sub per 05-hsp-plan.md § C (target 75% HUB share).

cost_lines.description: Selective interior demolition — existing finishes, casework, ceilings, walls, MEP terminations
cost_lines.notes: Formula: SF × $/SF. Carry $8-$14/SF for active-building complete-MEP-included strip per 04-scope-of-work.md § C Div 02. Quantity assumes ~2,500 SF; verify against demo drawings.

cost_lines.description: MEP demo (HVAC + plumbing + electrical) by respective MEP subs in coordination with demo sub
cost_lines.notes: $3-$6/SF allowance OR rolled into MEP sub scope. Verify scope split with subs at quote time.

cost_lines.description: Hazardous-materials abatement allowance (asbestos, lead, PCBs) — pending ASU EHS survey
cost_lines.notes: $0 if EHS survey clears; $10K-$25K allowance if survey is positive OR not available. See 07-risk-register.md R-03. May also be funded from the $25K cash/contingency allowance.

cost_lines.description: Pre-abatement air quality survey + post-abatement clearance testing (independent agency)
cost_lines.notes: Only if hazmat abatement is triggered. ~$2,000-$5,000.

divisions.title: Masonry
divisions.notes: Specialty trade; thin HUB representation per 05-hsp-plan.md § C (target 25% HUB share with documented GFE).

cost_lines.description: Existing brick wall restoration — clean (remove paint/coatings if applicable), tuckpoint failed joints, apply clear sealer
cost_lines.notes: $18-$35/SF range. Confirm against drawings whether brick is exposed existing (most likely) or new veneer (unusual). Mock-up required per 06-quality-control-plan.md § 3.

divisions.title: Carpentry / Finish Carpentry / Theater Millwork
divisions.notes: Theater-grade millwork is specialty; HUB representation thinner per 05-hsp-plan.md § C (target 25% HUB share with documented GFE).

cost_lines.description: Rough carpentry — wall blocking for owner-furnished items (mirrors, costume rack mounts, ADA grab bars, CBORD reader backing)
cost_lines.notes: Small allowance ~50-150 SF of 2x or PT plywood blocking. If drawings call out per-mount EA, convert before pricing.

cost_lines.description: Finish carpentry — door trim, base trim, wall accent trim (paint-grade MDF or wood)
cost_lines.notes: $12-$22/LF for paint-grade installed.

cost_lines.description: Architectural millwork — makeup vanities, counters, mirror surrounds with LED-lit mirror frames (theater-grade), costume storage shelving
cost_lines.notes: $400-$700/LF for theater-grade installed with LED mirror lighting. LONG LEAD 10-14 wk per 05-schedule-narrative.md § 4. Submit Week 1 of NTP.

divisions.title: Openings — Doors, Frames, Hardware
divisions.notes: Material-only buy via distributor (potentially HUB-certified distributor); self-install OR small install sub. Sargent specified by name.

cost_lines.description: Hollow metal frame, with electric-strike mortise prep for CBORD-controlled doors
cost_lines.notes: 4-8 EA at dressing-room entries. $950/EA seed; lead time 8-10 wk per 05-schedule-narrative.md § 4.

cost_lines.description: Solid-core wood door
cost_lines.notes: 4-8 EA paired with HM frames. $575/EA seed.

cost_lines.description: Sargent cylindrical lockset (specified by name) — ANSI Grade 1, US26D
cost_lines.notes: $500-$700/EA for institutional Sargent. Confirm series (7/10/11-Line) against hardware schedule. LONG LEAD 8-14 wk per 05-schedule-narrative.md § 4. Submit Week 1.

cost_lines.description: Door hardware accessories — closers, kick plates, silencers, thresholds, stops (per ADA + TTUS standard set)
cost_lines.notes: $250-$450/EA set. ADA-compliant reach and force settings.

cost_lines.description: Door hardware prep for CBORD — electric strike mortise (HM frame already prepped above), electric hinge if specified, low-voltage conduit + ring & string + 120V or PoE pathway to plenum (electric strike + reader DEVICES are OWNER-FURNISHED)
cost_lines.notes: $350-$650/EA prep labor + materials. Devices are owner-furnished per 04-scope-of-work.md § A. Coordinate with CBORD admin per R-06.

divisions.title: Finishes — Framing, GWB, ACT, Flooring, Base, Paint
divisions.notes: Multiple sub trades; each sub gets a separate sub-quote per 05-hsp-plan.md § C.

cost_lines.description: Metal-stud framing for new partitions + furring at existing brick
cost_lines.notes: $6.40/SF seed. SF = partition LF × height for new partitions + LF × height for brick furring.

cost_lines.description: 5/8" Type-X GWB on framing (moisture-resistant in wet zones); both faces of partitions
cost_lines.notes: $2.85/SF seed. SF = 2 × partition LF × height (both faces) + 1 × brick-furring LF × height (single face).

cost_lines.description: Acoustical ceiling tile — 2x4 (or 2x2) lay-in grid + tile
cost_lines.notes: $5.10/SF seed. ~2,000 SF estimated dry-zone ceiling; verify against RCP.

cost_lines.description: Sheet vinyl flooring with heat-welded seams — theater-friendly, slip-resistant
cost_lines.notes: $8-$12/SF allowance (no cost-DB hit). Lead time 4-6 wk per 05-schedule-narrative.md § 4.

cost_lines.description: LVT (luxury vinyl tile) in adjacent circulation / vestibule
cost_lines.notes: $6.40/SF seed. Quantity 0 unless drawings show non-dressing-room areas in scope.

cost_lines.description: Ceramic / porcelain tile in wet zones (shower stalls + walls) — ONLY IF showers in scope
cost_lines.notes: Floor tile $18-$30/SF + wall tile $14-$22/SF. Confirm against drawings.

cost_lines.description: Waterproofing membrane under wet-zone tile (Schluter Kerdi or similar)
cost_lines.notes: $4-$7/SF. Only if wet zones present.

cost_lines.description: Resilient base — 4" rubber, integral or cove
cost_lines.notes: $3.25/LF seed. Perimeter ~250-350 LF for a 2,500 SF multi-room suite.

cost_lines.description: Interior painting — walls + ceilings (GWB) + door frames; 2-coat institutional low-VOC latex
cost_lines.notes: $1.65/SF seed. SF = wall LF × ceiling height + soffit/ceiling SF (GWB) + door-frame allowance. After-hours premium possible for occupied-building VOC management. Target 100% HUB sub per 05-hsp-plan.md § C.

divisions.title: Specialties
divisions.notes: Material-only buy via HUB distributor where available.

cost_lines.description: Room signage — ADA-compliant raised characters + Braille
cost_lines.notes: 4-8 EA. $95/EA seed. Per ASU/TTUS wayfinding standard.

cost_lines.description: Toilet accessories — grab bars, paper holders, ADA mirrors, soap dispensers (if private toilets in scope)
cost_lines.notes: 0-4 sets. $850/EA seed.

cost_lines.description: Fire extinguishers + recessed cabinets (1 per 75 ft travel distance per code)
cost_lines.notes: 2-3 EA. $350-$650/EA installed.

cost_lines.description: Lockers / costume storage
cost_lines.notes: OWNER-FURNISHED per RFCSP if listed under 'furniture'. DO NOT PRICE. Coordinate install access only.

divisions.title: Fire Suppression
divisions.notes: OWNER-FURNISHED per RFCSP narrative. Sprinkler-head relocation, FP main mods, FP shutdown all by owner's FP contractor. Coordination only — included in Div 01 GCs. See 04-scope-of-work.md § A. Confirm in writing with Samuel via outreach/02-email-samuel-guevara-owner-furnished.md.

cost_lines.description: Sprinkler-head relocation + FP main modifications
cost_lines.notes: OWNER-FURNISHED. Carry zero. Coordination access only via Div 01.

divisions.title: Plumbing
divisions.notes: Full system replacement per RFCSP. Target 50% HUB share per 05-hsp-plan.md § C.

cost_lines.description: Plumbing fixture — ADA wall-hung lavatory with sensor or lever faucet (full rough-in + set)
cost_lines.notes: 2-4 EA. $1,850/EA seed.

cost_lines.description: Plumbing fixture — ADA water closet (floor- or wall-mounted; if private toilets in scope)
cost_lines.notes: 0-4 EA. Confirm against fixture schedule.

cost_lines.description: ADA shower stall (60x36 transfer or roll-in with seat) + thermostatic mixing valve — IF showers in scope
cost_lines.notes: 0-4 EA. $4,500-$7,500/EA installed.

cost_lines.description: Domestic water piping — supply, waste, vent rough-in (per fixture allowance)
cost_lines.notes: $525/EA seed; matches fixture count. Coordinate with existing risers.

cost_lines.description: Water heater (if existing dressing-room HW is dedicated and at end of life)
cost_lines.notes: Allowance only; confirm against existing conditions or drawings.

divisions.title: HVAC
divisions.notes: Full system replacement per RFCSP. Specialty trade with thinner HUB representation; target 25% HUB share with documented GFE per 05-hsp-plan.md § C.

cost_lines.description: HVAC system replacement — air handler / VAV terminal + ductwork + diffusers/grilles + DDC controls integrated with ASU BMS
cost_lines.notes: $30-$45/SF for full-replacement complete in active building. ~2,500 SF served. Equipment LONG LEAD 8-12 wk per 05-schedule-narrative.md § 4.

cost_lines.description: Dressing-room exhaust (hair/makeup chemical vapors) — dedicated exhaust fan + ductwork to roof
cost_lines.notes: $1,500-$3,500/EA installed. Higher ACH than standard back-of-house.

cost_lines.description: Test, adjust, balance (TAB) report — independent agency
cost_lines.notes: $3,500-$8,500 for this size of system. Per UGSC Art. 7.

cost_lines.description: HVAC controls commissioning + integration with ASU BMS
cost_lines.notes: Coordinate with ASU BMS team.

divisions.title: Electrical
divisions.notes: Full system replacement + theater-grade lighting per RFCSP. Target 50% HUB share per 05-hsp-plan.md § C.

cost_lines.description: Branch wiring + devices — receptacles, switches, GFCI in wet zones, dedicated 20A at makeup stations; includes pathway for owner-furnished CBORD readers + AV equipment power
cost_lines.notes: $8.40/SF seed across ~2,500 SF.

cost_lines.description: Theater-grade dimmable LED lighting + makeup-mirror task lighting (may be in Div 06 millwork) + egress/emergency lighting
cost_lines.notes: $350-$650/EA dimmable LED for theater-grade. ~25 fixtures from RCP + makeup-mirror surrounds. LONG LEAD 6-8 wk per 05-schedule-narrative.md § 4.

cost_lines.description: Lighting controls — occupancy + manual override + dimming
cost_lines.notes: $1,500-$3,500/room. Per ASU/TTUS standard.

cost_lines.description: Sub-panel for dressing-room loads (if existing panel insufficient)
cost_lines.notes: 0-1 EA. $5,500-$8,500/EA institutional 200A. Seed DB $2,400 is residential — under-sized.

divisions.title: Communications / Low-Voltage
divisions.notes: PATHWAY ONLY — cable and termination are OWNER-FURNISHED per RFCSP. Target 50% HUB share per 05-hsp-plan.md § C.

cost_lines.description: Low-voltage pathway — plenum-rated conduit + J-boxes + ring & string + faceplate-ready opening (for owner-furnished data + AV + CBORD cable)
cost_lines.notes: $125-$250/EA outlet. CABLE + TERMINATION + JACKS are owner-furnished. DO NOT PRICE.

cost_lines.description: Data cable, terminations, faceplates, jacks, testing
cost_lines.notes: OWNER-FURNISHED per RFCSP. DO NOT PRICE. ASU's cabling vendor handles.

divisions.title: Electronic Safety + Security + Fire Alarm
divisions.notes: FA relocation by GC; CBORD devices by owner. Coordinate shutdowns with ASU EHS via UGSC Art. 8.

cost_lines.description: Fire-alarm device relocation (strobe, smoke detector) — incidental to ceiling demo + new ceiling install
cost_lines.notes: 4-10 EA. $350-$650/EA installed. Coordinate shutdown windows with ASU EHS (2-week lead time per UGSC Art. 8).

cost_lines.description: CBORD access-control readers, controllers, electric strikes
cost_lines.notes: OWNER-FURNISHED per RFCSP. DO NOT PRICE devices. Door prep + low-voltage pathway IS in our scope under Div 08 + Div 27.

direct_cost_subtotal.expected_range_at_2500_sf: $320,000 - $440,000 (for the 'Mid reno' scenario per price-references.md § E)

base_proposal_price.expected_range: $425,000 - $560,000 envelope per price-references.md § A; midpoint ~$485K matches $500K published budget

cash_contingency_allowance.destination: Attachment A § 2b (SEPARATE line, NOT marked up, NOT in base)

unit_prices.note: Per Attachment A unit-price grid (VERIFY against actual PDF). Formula: each unit price = sub_bare_cost × (1.10 sub OH/profit) × (1.08 contingency) × (1.10 GC OH) × (1.06 GC profit) × (1.025 bond+insurance) ≈ sub_bare_cost × 1.357 effective markup. Bid AT FULL RETAIL — these set the change-order ceiling.

lines.description: Additional/deduct dressing-room SF (full reno including finishes + MEP)
Additional door + HM frame + Sargent cylindrical lockset + CBORD prep
Additional ADA water closet + plumbing rough-in
Additional makeup-mirror surround with LED frame (millwork)
Additional SF of acoustical ceiling tile (grid + tile)
Additional SF of sheet vinyl flooring (heat-welded)
Additional SF of paint (2 coats institutional)
Hazmat abatement (VCT + mastic per SF if found)
lines.deduct_unit_price: n/a — abatement is presence-triggered, no deduct
